subject: Status review: parrot milestone in Tokyo | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-1373
body: Here is a progress summary for the parrot plan in Tokyo. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Albert Einstein is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-1373. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: coordination, coffee.
